calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-02-2007 Continued To Nov-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-05-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stanley Dintcho, Appellant/Defendant
Edward Lawton for Respondent/Plaintiff Stretch the Imagination

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Edward Lawton testifies on behalf of Stretch the Imagination. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1 - Standard Multi-Tenant Office Lease
Exhibit 2 - Letter from Stanley Dintcho, dated 7/31/07
Exhibit 3 - Various Receipts
Exhibit 4 - 10 Colored Photographs of the Subject Property
Exhibit 5 - Letter dated 8/2/07 re: Lease for 2550 Union Street

Stanley Dintcho testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit A - Stanley Dintcho's Claim agains Michelle LaMotte dba Stretch the Imagination, LLC

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

JPT Sharon L. O'Grady, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (525)
